prompt: Right now we store full.jsonl when doing a checkpoint in `entire/sessions` when keeping the session active with claude we commit the growing log in commit after commit. Can we take a look and see if we can get the last row from the current session log at the start of a prompt and then track that for the checkpoint? so we can know what was added during this checkpoint?
